text.title: Testing in Go Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether testing-go applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the test target a pure Go function/method in this module?

example.description: When `yes AND multiple input/output pairs` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
